title: wrightia lanceolata
intro: Wrightia lanceolata, also known as Indian snake root or Wrightia, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Wrightia lanceolata include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, Wrightia lanceolata is often used as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its various therapeutic uses.
